payload.answer: Duplicate Slack event detected; ignore as a retry and do not create a new memory.
citations: input: Same Slack event ID delivered twice for: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

entity_resolution.reason: This is a duplicate delivery of the same Slack event ID, so no new durable memory should be created or updated.

details: Duplicate event recognized by identical Slack event ID.

repair_options: Process only the first delivery and drop subsequent deliveries with the same Slack event ID.
If a memory was already created from the first delivery, leave it unchanged and do not duplicate it.
